message:
Add runs list, run detail view, and screenshot serving

- Screenshot route on results API serves images from result directories
- RunsList sidebar component with status badges and duration display
- RunDetail view shows summary, reasoning, observations, screenshots, usage
- Fanout actions (from observations, analyze failure) wired to refresh cards
- New Run placeholder button in sidebar for upcoming Task 12
- useResults hook follows same pattern as useCards

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
